layout.update_detected: An updated app version was detected. Reloading...
index.header.title: Create A New Job
index.header.description: Complete Hugging Face / pyannote setup first, then choose audio files or a directory and start a job.
index.setup.title: Check Settings First
index.active.title: Currently Running
index.active.none_description: When a job starts, a progress summary appears here.
index.form.files.title: Choose Files
index.form.files.description: You can select multiple audio files at once.
index.form.directory.title: Choose A Directory
index.form.directory.description: On Edge / Chrome-based browsers you can choose a directory and send the audio files under it.
index.form.select_input: Select audio files or a directory.
index.form.cache_notice: Uploaded audio files are treated as temporary cache. They are deleted 10 minutes after a job completes or fails, and immediately when the job is deleted.
index.history.title: Completed Jobs
index.history.description: Completed runs can be downloaded as ZIP files. Unneeded runs can be deleted.
index.history.empty: There are no completed jobs yet.
setup.title: First-Time Setup
setup.description: Complete only the required setup steps, one at a time.
setup.language.title: Choose the display language
setup.compute.title: Choose the processing mode for this PC
setup.account.title: Do you have a Hugging Face account?
setup.account.description: A free Hugging Face account and a Read token are required for the speaker diarization AI model.
setup.register.title: Create a Hugging Face account
setup.register.description: After signing up, return to this screen and continue.
setup.token.title: Create a dedicated Read token for TimelineForAudio
setup.token.description: For safety, create a new Read token for this app instead of reusing an existing token.
setup.token.guide_open: Open the Hugging Face Access Tokens page.
setup.token.guide_copy: Create the token, then copy it.
setup.token.security_note: Do not use a stronger token such as one with Write access.
setup.token.invalid: The token is invalid. Check the copied value.
setup.token.check_failed: Token verification failed. Check the network connection and try again.
setup.approval.title: Approve the pyannote AI model
setup.approval.description: The token was accepted. Now approve the pyannote model terms on Hugging Face.
setup.approval.not_ready: Approval is not available yet. Finish the approval page, then check again.
setup.complete.title: Setup Complete
setup.complete.description: The token and AI model approval were verified.
setup.complete.status: Verification is complete. You can create a new job now.
settings.header.description: Set the processing mode for this PC and check the Hugging Face connection status here.
settings.models.title: AI Models Used By This App
settings.cache.title: Saved AI Models
settings.cache.description: Delete saved AI models here if you want the app to download them again.
settings.cache.empty: There are no saved AI models to delete.
settings.notice.title: One AI model needs approval on Hugging Face.
settings.notice.description: Save your token, then open the approval page for the speaker split AI model.
settings.token_hint: If a token is already saved, this field shows a masked value. Leave it as-is to keep the saved token, or enter a new token to replace it.
settings.token_hint_short: Enter a new token only when you want to replace it.
settings.connection.title: Hugging Face Connection
settings.connection.model_state.download: AI Model Downloads On First Run
settings.connection.model_state.token_ch: Check Token Before AI Model Use
settings.connection.hint_download: The AI model will download automatically on the first run.
settings.connection.hint_approval: Open the approval page and approve the pyannote AI model.
settings.connection.hint_invalid_token: Check the token and save again.
settings.connection.hint_unknown: The connection status could not be verified. Save the token again if needed.
settings.connection.description: This is required for the speaker diarization model. Saving also refreshes the token and approval status.
settings.connection.authorized_note: You can create a new job now.
settings.connection.approval_note: The token is saved. Complete approval for the pyannote model on Hugging Face.
settings.connection.token_missing_note: Enter a token and save to check the current access state.
settings.connection.unknown_note: The token status could not be verified. Update the token and save again, or check the token settings.
settings.compute_mode.title: Processing Mode
settings.compute_mode.description: Choose CPU or GPU. GPU is faster, but it only works when Docker can use your NVIDIA GPU.
settings.compute_mode.gpu_note: Faster when GPU access is available.
settings.compute_mode.auto_selected: There is no saved preference yet, so {0} is selected automatically.
settings.compute_mode.gpu_unavailable_no: GPU is not ready yet. CPU will still work.
settings.compute_mode.gpu_unavailable: GPU mode is not available on this machine yet.
settings.compute_mode.saved_gpu_unavaila: GPU was saved previously, but it is not available right now, so CPU is shown instead.
settings.compute_mode.help_intro: Use GPU mode only when this PC and Docker can access a supported NVIDIA GPU.
settings.compute_mode.help_req_docker: Docker must be able to use the GPU through CUDA.
settings.compute_mode.help_req_high: Available GPU memory affects processing speed and stability.
settings.compute_mode.help_req_8gb: Available GPU memory affects processing speed and stability.
settings.save_success: Settings were saved and the connection status was refreshed.
settings.save_invalid_token: Settings were saved, but the token should be checked.
settings.token_required: Enter a Hugging Face token before continuing.
settings.save_blocked: Complete the required setup fields before continuing.
settings.save_pending: Settings were saved, but approval is still needed.
settings.save_check: Settings were saved, but the connection status could not be verified.
settings.save_note: Saving refreshes the Hugging Face token and approval status.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.heading: App Language
settings.language.description: Change the display language used in this app. During job processing, that display language is also used internally as a language hint.
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.theme.description: Choose how the app should look.
settings.next_steps.title: Next Step
settings.next_steps.description: This section shows only the action that matters right now.
settings.next_steps.ready: Everything needed for job creation is ready.
settings.next_steps.token_missing: A token has not been configured yet.
settings.next_steps.approval_pending: The token is saved, but model approval is still needed.
settings.next_steps.needs_attention: The token or approval state could not be verified.
settings.next_steps.item_ready: You can create a new job now.
settings.next_steps.item_token: Enter your Hugging Face token and save.
settings.next_steps.item_approval: Open the approval page and approve pyannote speaker diarization.
settings.next_steps.item_check: Update the token and save again, or verify the Hugging Face settings.
settings.next_steps.item_cpu: This environment will use CPU processing.
settings.models.details_description: Expand this only when you need the technical details.
settings.maintenance.title: Maintenance
settings.maintenance.description: Use these options only when you need to redownload or reset the app state.
settings.maintenance.cache_description: Delete saved AI models. They will download again automatically when needed.
settings.maintenance.cache_confirm: Delete the saved AI models now?
settings.maintenance.jobs_confirm: Type DELETE to remove all jobs.
settings.maintenance.reset_description: Restore the app to its initial state. This deletes every job, the saved token, approval state, saved AI models, and settings.
settings.maintenance.reset_description_s: Reset every job, the saved token, saved AI models, and settings.
settings.maintenance.reset_confirm: Type DELETE to restore the app to its initial state. This deletes every job, the saved token, approval state, saved AI models, and settings.
settings.maintenance.reset_done: The app was restored to its initial state.
language.header.title: Choose Language
language.header.description: Choose the language to use in this app before opening settings.
language.form.label: Language
language.form.hint: You can change this later in Settings.
jobs.new.description: Choose your audio files, then press Start.
jobs.new.files_description: Pick one or more audio files from this computer.
jobs.new.directory_description: Pick one folder and upload every audio file inside it.
jobs.new.output_description: Create only the artifacts you need.
jobs.new.readable_text_enabled_note: Turn this off to create IPA only. This skips readable-text reconstruction and makes the job lighter.
jobs.new.supplemental_context.title: Names and Spelling Notes
jobs.new.supplemental_context.descriptio: Audio file names are included automatically. Paste any names or spellings as-is.
jobs.new.supplemental_context.placeholde: People, products, titles, spellings, notes, table cells, or JSON
jobs.new.supplemental_context.help: Rough notes, pasted spreadsheet cells, or a JSON snippet are all fine.
jobs.new.cache_notice: Uploaded audio files are temporary. They are deleted after the job finishes or when you delete the job.
jobs.new.select_input: Choose audio files or a folder first.
jobs.new.duplicate_no_job_message: All selected files were already converted, so no new job was created.
jobs.new.upload_waiting: Your audio files will upload first. Then processing starts.
jobs.new.upload_leave_warning: A file upload is still running.
jobs.list.description: See the current job and browse all jobs in one list.
jobs.list.delete_all_confirm: Type DELETE to remove all jobs.
jobs.active.title: Active Job
jobs.active.heading: Now Processing
jobs.active.description: Only one job runs at a time. Open details to see more.
jobs.active.empty: There is no active job right now.
details.rerun_description: Create a new job from the same inputs. Explicit reruns always process the selected files again, even if matching results already exist.
details.rerun_original_note: Uses the compute mode and language hint saved with this job.
details.rerun_current_note: Uses the current Settings values for compute mode and language hint.
details.conversion_info_empty: No conversion info is available yet.
details.generated_timeline_empty: There are no generated artifacts to display yet.
details.generated_timeline_reused_missin: A previous result was found, but the reused artifact file is no longer available. Run the file again to generate a fresh result.
details.worker_log_empty: No worker log is available yet.
media.preview_empty: There is no preview to display.
artifact.ipa.help_intro: It is pronunciation-based intermediate data. Most users can simply read Readable Text.
artifact.ipa.help_point_1: This app keeps speech as IPA first, then reconstructs Readable Text from it.
artifact.ipa.help_point_2: Readable Text is the reading output. IPA is mainly for verification and reuse.
artifact.ipa.help_point_3: Use IPA when you want to inspect pronunciation-like output or try a different reconstruction later.
error.subtitle: An error occurred while processing your request.
error.development_description: Switching to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.
error.development_warning: Do not enable the Development environment for deployed applications. It can expose sensitive exception details to end users. For local debugging, set ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT to Development and restart the app.
privacy.description: Use this page to describe how uploaded files, generated output, tokens, and temporary cache are handled.
errors.api.language_required: Choose a language before using this endpoint.
errors.api.settings_required: Complete settings before using this endpoint.
errors.no_input_audio: Choose at least one audio file.
errors.job_not_found: The selected job could not be found.
errors.job_rerun_active: Finish the current job before running it again.
errors.job_request_missing: This job does not have the data needed for rerun.
errors.job_in_progress: This job is still in progress.
errors.upload_file_name_required: An upload file name is required.
errors.upload_file_size_invalid: The upload file size is invalid.
errors.upload_file_not_found: The upload file could not be found.
errors.upload_chunks_order: Upload chunks must be sent in order.
errors.upload_session_path_invalid: The upload session path is invalid.
errors.upload_session_not_found: The upload session could not be found.
errors.hf_token_missing: A Hugging Face token is not configured.
errors.hf_terms_unconfirmed: Complete approval for the pyannote model on Hugging Face.
access.authorized: Access to the pyannote model is available.
access.approval_required: The token is valid, but model approval is still needed.
access.unauthorized: Token is saved, but approval is still needed.
